category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Tarsnap GUI as an open source cross-platform front-end to the Tarsnap backup service using the Tarsnap command-line client utilities.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is Tarsnap/tarsnap-gui and README refers to Tarsnap GUI.
docs_sources: Official README says to read more about Tarsnap GUI in the GitHub Wiki; README itself includes installation/build pointers.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Tarsnap/tarsnap-gui; repo not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README calls it a cross-platform front-end to the Tarsnap backup service and notes it uses Tarsnap command-line client utilities; repository language metadata shows C++/QMake.
